linkedin.text:
800 guests. One historic venue. Zero margin for error.

Most teams call an event this size a logistical nightmare. We call it a Tuesday.

The brief was simple to say and brutal to execute: a gala dinner for 800 international guests where nothing could slip. What guests saw was effortless — synchronized arrivals, multilingual hosts, a four-course service that started and ended on time, and an after-party they still talk about.

What made it effortless was 14 months of planning and a UPE crew trained to anticipate the problem before it becomes one. That's the real product. Scale isn't the challenge we manage — it's the discipline we're built on.

If your next event has a number that scares your current planner, that's exactly the conversation we want to have. DM us or book a call.

#CorporateEvents #IncentiveTravel #EventProduction

✨ Synchronized arrivals — no chaos at the door
🗣️ Multilingual hosts for every guest
🍽️ Four-course service, started and ended on time

Scale isn't our challenge. It's our specialty.
